policy.candidate_copy_boundary: This miner never opens candidate copy, battle, promotion, or value-safe reclassification.
policy.freshness_boundary: A card already used, seen, stage-only, blocked, or traced in the current evidence chain is not fresh.
policy.hard_block_boundary: Commanders, lands, payoff slots, expected anchors, structural staples, and cross-role-risk sources are not fresh clean cuts.
policy.same_lane_boundary: Only cards with a profile role matching the recovery target role are considered.
